/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-sixlowpan-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-sixlowpan-default.so "CMakeFiles/sixlowpan.dir/helper/sixlowpan-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/sixlowpan.dir/model/sixlowpan-header.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/sixlowpan.dir/model/sixlowpan-net-device.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
